import { Subject } from '../Subject'; import { innerFrom } from '../observable/innerFrom'; import { operate } from '../util/lift'; import { fromSubscribable } from '../observable/fromSubscribable'; const DEFAULT_CONFIG = { connector: () => new Subject(), }; export function connect(selector, config = DEFAULT_CONFIG) { const { connector } = config; return operate((source, subscriber) => { const subject = connector(); innerFrom(selector(fromSubscribable(subject))).subscribe(subscriber); subscriber.add(source.subscribe(subject)); }); } //# sourceMappingURL=connect.js.map
